page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs running at 2.9 GHz, paired with 310 GB of system memory. The instance is equipped with a single NVIDIA A10 GPU based on the Ampere architecture, providing 24 GB of dedicated VRAM. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and utilizes the x86_64 CPU architecture with support for advanced vector and cryptographic instruction sets.

In benchmark evaluations, this instance demonstrates top-tier performance in large language model inference, delivering 9711.08 tokens per second for prompt processing on small models and 2509.43 tokens per second on medium models. It also registers strong performance in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and Passmark CPU encryption tests. Other general compute benchmarks, including Geekbench multi-core and Passmark database operations, fall within the average range.

A key hardware tradeoff is the complete absence of local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options over the baseline 16 Gbps network interface. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the single-GPU configuration combined with a high count of dedicated Intel Xeon cores provides a balanced resource density for parallel processing tasks. This makes the instance highly suitable for workloads such as medium-scale LLM inference, image processing, ray tracing, and cryptographic applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs at 2.9 GHz, 310 GB of RAM, and a single NVIDIA A10 GPU with 24 GB of VRAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance delivers top-tier performance in LLM inference for small and medium models, alongside strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and cryptographic execution. However, it lacks local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage over a 16 Gbps baseline network. This hardware profile provides a cost-efficient, single-GPU environment for machine learning inference, image processing, and compute-heavy workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 48 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 310 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A10 GPU. It offers top-tier LLM inference performance but lacks local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-c48g1.12xlarge features 48 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 310 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A10 GPU, delivering top-tier LLM inference performance.
tagline: A dedicated single-GPU compute instance optimized for machine learning inference, cryptographic workloads, and parallel processing without local storage.
bullet_points: 48 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.9 GHz
NVIDIA A10 Ampere GPU with 24 GB of VRAM
310 GB of system memory with 6.46 GB per core
Top-tier LLM inference speeds for small and medium models
No local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on KVM hypervisor
